subcodes.first_line: O ye two cherished handmaidens of the Blessed Beauty! What thought is this, and what impossible fancy, for even as [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو کنیز عزیز جمال مبارک این چه گمانست و این چه تصور محال زیرا چنانکه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @music and singing, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
